description_long: This is a medium-sized rectangular cardboard box, commonly used for shipping and delivery in urban environments. The box is made from corrugated brown cardboard and features printed black text and symbols, including handling instructions, a QR code, and the words 'ESTE LADO ARRIBA' and 'DELICADO' indicating the correct upright orientation and that the contents are fragile. The box has visible seams and flaps, with some minor water stains and wear marks, suggesting it has been handled or transported. The sides display icons for handling, such as 'keep dry', 'handle with care', and 'do not stack', as well as branding and a section labeled '¿QUÉ CONTIENE ESTA CAJA?'. The overall appearance is utilitarian, designed for practical use in logistics, storage, or delivery scenarios.
description: A brown corrugated cardboard shipping box with printed handling instructions, branding, and visible wear. It features icons, text in Spanish, and a QR code on its sides.
description_view_0: This view shows the side with the '¿QUÉ CONTIENE ESTA CAJA?' label, three empty squares, and several handling icons.
description_view_1: This view highlights the top of the box with 'ESTE LADO ARRIBA' and 'DELICADO' printed, as well as the main seam and some branding.
description_view_2: This view displays the side with the 'empacor' logo, QR code, and additional handling instructions, along with visible water stains.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the side with the 'empacor' logo, QR code, and the '¿QUÉ CONTIENE ESTA CAJA?' label, showing the box's edge and seam.
